# Style Reference Guide

<!-- Generated by design-style-agent -->
<!-- Feature: Team Task Management -->
<!-- Light mode only (NFR5) — sans-serif, compact layout, primary blue #2563EB -->

## Typography

- **Heading hierarchy:** `h1` for page-level titles (e.g., "My Tasks", "All Tasks"), `h2` for section headings within a page, `h3` for card titles. Avoid deeper nesting.
- **Body text:** Default Tailwind base size (14–16px). Use `text-sm` for table rows and metadata (due dates, status labels) to support compact layout.
- **Font family:** Sans-serif (`font-sans` — Geist Sans). No serif or monospace for UI text.
- **Font weight:** `font-medium` (500) for labels, column headers, and button text. `font-normal` (400) for body and table cell data. `font-semibold` (600) for page titles only.
- **Line height:** Default Tailwind line heights. Do not set custom `leading-` on table cells — compact density is handled via padding, not line height.

## Spacing

- **Compact layout:** Use `p-3` (12px) for card padding, `p-2` (8px) for table cell padding. Avoid `p-6` or larger for content containers.
- **Section gaps:** `gap-4` between major sections (header → filter bar → table). `gap-2` between form fields within a modal/form.
- **Page-level container:** Max-width `max-w-5xl` for the main content area, centered with `mx-auto`. Padding `px-4 py-6`.
- **Form field spacing:** `space-y-4` between labelled form fields. Labels sit directly above inputs with no extra gap.
- **Modal padding:** `p-6` inside Dialog content — modals warrant slightly more breathing room than inline content.
- **Button spacing:** Use Shadcn default button padding. Do not override button internal padding.

## Component Selection

- **Task list:** Use a plain `<table>` styled with Tailwind classes (or a `<div>`-based grid if striped rows are preferred) rather than `<Card>`. Table rows use `bg-muted` (light grey `#F3F4F6`) for alternating stripes or hover states.
- **Task detail / edit:** Use Shadcn `<Dialog>` for the modal overlay (R6, R9). The same Dialog serves both view and edit modes via an internal state toggle.
- **Delete confirmation:** Use Shadcn `<AlertDialog>` — it provides the accessible confirmation pattern required by R10.
- **Create task form:** Render inside a Shadcn `<Dialog>` triggered by the "Create Task" button.
- **Status filter:** Use Shadcn `<Tabs>` (All / Pending / Complete) for the filter bar — tab-style selection is more accessible than a select dropdown for this use case.
- **User assignment selector:** Use Shadcn `<Select>` (not a free-text `<Input>`) — BR4 requires selecting from the existing user list.
- **Success toast:** Use Shadcn `<Sonner>` (toast) for the post-create success notification (R8).
- **Error banner:** Use a prominent inline `<Alert>` component (not a toast) for the task-list load-failure state (R14) — it must persist until the user retries.
- **Loading indicator:** Use Shadcn `<Button>` with `disabled` and a spinner icon (Lucide `Loader2` with `animate-spin`) for the mark-complete in-flight state (R12).

## Layout

- **Application shell:** Sidebar navigation on the left (`w-56`, `bg-sidebar`), main content on the right. Use CSS grid (`grid-cols-[224px_1fr]`) at the root layout level.
- **Sidebar items:** Role-aware — team-member sees only "My Tasks"; admin sees "All Tasks". Highlight active route with `bg-sidebar-accent` and `text-sidebar-primary`.
- **Max content width:** `max-w-5xl` for task list and form pages. Dialogs are full-width of their container up to `max-w-lg`.
- **Desktop only in v1:** No responsive grid changes needed. Target `min-width: 1024px`. Tablet (`768px+`) is best-effort; do not add mobile-specific classes.
- **Header bar:** Inside main content area (not a global header). Shows page title and the "Create Task" button (admin only) aligned to the right with `justify-between`.

## Motion and Animation

- **Transitions:** Subtle — use Tailwind `transition-colors` (150ms) on hover states. Do not add custom keyframe animations to business UI elements.
- **Dialogs:** Shadcn Dialog includes built-in enter/exit animations — do not override.
- **Mark Complete in-flight:** Show `Loader2` spinner on the button, do not animate the row or table.
- **Reduced motion:** `globals.css` already includes `prefers-reduced-motion` suppression — no additional handling needed.
- **Loading skeletons:** Not required for v1. Show the error banner (R14) or an empty state instead of skeleton loaders.

## Accessibility

- **Contrast:** Primary blue (`#2563EB` → `oklch(0.519 0.198 253)`) on white background meets WCAG AA for large text and UI components. White text on primary blue meets AA for normal text.
- **Focus rings:** `--ring` is set to primary blue — Shadcn components inherit this automatically. Do not suppress focus rings.
- **Interactive elements:** All buttons, links, and form controls must have accessible labels. Use `aria-label` on icon-only buttons (e.g., a delete icon button).
- **Dialogs:** Shadcn `<Dialog>` and `<AlertDialog>` manage focus trapping automatically — do not implement custom focus management.
- **Table accessibility:** Use proper `<thead>` / `<tbody>` / `<th scope="col">` markup for the task list table.
- **Status filter tabs:** Use `role="tablist"` / `role="tab"` semantics (Shadcn Tabs provides this). Ensure the active tab has `aria-selected="true"`.
- **NFR1:** WCAG 2.1 Level AA is the target — all interactive elements must be keyboard-operable.

## Brand Tone

- **Microcopy style:** Professional and direct. Short sentences. No emojis in UI text.
- **Button labels:** Action verbs — "Create Task", "Mark Complete", "Save Changes", "Delete", "Cancel", "Retry". Avoid "Submit" or "OK".
- **Error messages:** Clear and actionable. Use the exact copy from the FRS where specified (e.g., "Unable to load tasks. Please try again." for R14, "Delete this task? This cannot be undone." for R10).
- **Empty states:** Use the exact copy from the FRS — "No tasks assigned to you yet." (R4) and "No tasks have been created yet." (R5). Center the message in the content area with `text-muted-foreground`.
- **Validation messages:** Inline, below the field. Use `text-destructive text-sm`. Example: "Title is required" or "Title must be 200 characters or fewer".
- **Success feedback:** Single toast notification after task creation (R8). Keep toast copy brief: "Task created successfully."
